title: Primulina danxiaensis
taxonomy: Primulina danxiaensis is classified in the family Gesneriaceae, which is a family of flowering plants. It belongs to the genus Primulina, a group of plants that are native to Asia. intro: Primulina danxiaensis, also known as Danxia primula, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. Research has shown that this plant possesses various health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and infections. The bioactive constituents of Primulina danxiaensis include iridoids, such as danxiniridoid and danxiainoside, as well as phenolic acids and other secondary metabolites. Danxia primula is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and is often prepared as a tea or tincture, as well as being processed into capsules and tablets for modern herbal medicine.
